Air.description: Applies skill effects when an entity loses or gains air. This will fire every tick that the air value is updated.

Armor Equip.description: Applies skill effects when a player equips a new item in an armor or hand slot

Attribute Change.description: Applies skill effects when a player\

Block Break.description: Applies skill effects when a player breaks a block matching the given details

Block Place.description: Applies skill effects when a player places a block matching the given details

Cast.description: Applies skill effects when a player casts the skill using either the cast command, the skill bar, or click combos

Chat.description: Applies skill effects when a player sends a chat message in the specified format

Cleanup.description: Applies skill effects when the player disconnects or unlearns the skill. This is always applied with a skill level of 1 just for the sake of math

Consume.description: Applies skill effects when a player consumes an item

Crouch.description: Applies skill effects when a player starts or stops crouching using the shift key

Death.description: Applies skill effects when a player dies

Drop Item.description: Applies skill effects upon dropping an item

Entity Resurrect.description: Applies skill effects when an entity is resurrected.

Entity Target.description: Applies skill effects when an entity targets the caster

Environment Damage.description: Applies skill effects when a player takes environmental damage

Experience.description: Applies skill effects when a player earns vanilla experience by natural sources. Use {api-experience} to get amount of experience picked up.

Fishing.description: Applies skill effects upon right-clicking with a fishing rod

Fishing Bite.description: Applies skill effects when a fish bites the fishing rod of a player

Fishing Fail.description: Applies skill effects when a player fails to catch a fish due to poor timing

Fishing Grab.description: Applies skill effects when a player catches a fish

Fishing Ground.description: Applies skill effects when the bobber of a fishing rod hits the ground

Fishing Reel.description: Applies skill effects when a player reels in a fishing rod out of water or air with no fish on the rod

Flag.description: Applies skill effects when the player receives a flag from a mechanic.

Flag Expire.description: Applies skill effects when a flag expires on a player.

Flight Toggle.description: Applies skill effects when a player starts or stops flying.

Glide.description: Applies skill effects when a player starts or stops gliding with an elytra.

Harvest.description: Applies skill effects when a player harvests a block matching the given details. Typically crops such as Glow Berries.

Heal.description: Applies skill effects when the player receives heal from any source. Use {api-heal} to get heal value

Initialize.description: Applies skill effects immediately. This can be used for passive abilities

Item Swap.description: Applies skill effects upon pressing the swap-key on your keyboard

Jump.description: Applies skill effects whenever a player jumps.

Kill.description: Applies skill effects upon killing something

Land.description: Applies skill effects when a player lands on the ground

Launch.description: Applies skill effects when a player launches a projectile

Left Click.description: Applies skill effects upon performing a left-click

Move.description: Applies skill effects when a player moves around. This triggers every tick the player is moving, so use this sparingly. Use the \

Physical Damage.description: Applies skill effects when a player deals physical (or non-skill) damage. This includes melee attacks and firing a bow

Projectile Hit.description: Applies skill effects when a projectile hits a block/entity

Projectile Tick.description: Applies skill effects every interval while a projectile is in the air

Right Click.description: Applies skill effects upon performing a right-click (NOTE: When clicking in air, you have to have an item in your hand)

Riptide.description: Applies skill effects when a player uses the riptide enchantment.

Shear.description: Applies skill effects when a player shears an entity

Skill Downgrade.description: Applies skill effects when a player loses a level in a skill. The placeholders api-refund, api-skill, and api-level provide details about the downgrade.

Skill Upgrade.description: Applies skill effects when a player levels up a skill. The placeholders api-cost, api-skill, and api-level provide details about the upgrade.

Skill Cast.description: Applies skill effects when a player casts a skill

Skill Damage.description: Applies skill effects when a player deals damage with a skill. api-damage is the damage the target took

Sprint.description: Applies skill effects when a player starts or stops sprinting.

Strip Log.description: Applies skill effects when a player strips a block matching the given details

Took Physical Damage.description: Applies skill effects when a player takes physical (or non-skill) damage. This includes melee attacks and projectiles not fired by a skill

Took Skill Damage.description: Applies skill effects when a player takes damage from a skill other than their own

Shield.description: Applies skill effects when the player blocks damage with their shield. Use {api-blocked} to get amount of blocked damage.

Signal.description: Applies skill effects when the player receive a signal emitted from Signal Emit mechanic.

World Change.description: Applies skill effects when a player changes worlds

Area.description: Targets all units in a radius from the current target (the casting player is the default target)

Cone.description: Targets all units in a line in front of the current target (the casting player is the default target). If you include the caster, that counts towards the max amount

Linear.description: Targets all units in a line in front of the current target (the casting player is the default target)

Location.description: Targets the location the target or caster is looking at. Combine this with another targeting type for ranged area effects

Nearest.description: Targets the closest unit(s) in a radius from the current target (the casting player is the default target). If you include the caster, that counts towards the max number

Offset.description: Targets a location that is the given offset away from each target

Party.description: Targets players in your party (requires FabledParties to be installed)

Remember.description: Targets entities stored using the "Remember Targets" mechanic for the matching key. If it was never set, this will fail

Self.description: Returns the current target back to the caster

Single.description: Targets a single unit in front of the current target (the casting player is the default target)

World.description: Targets all entities in the caster\

Air Modify.description: Modifies the remaining air of an entity by a set amount of seconds. Positive numbers will add air, negative numbers will remove air. Players have a starting value of 15 seconds of air.

Air Set.description: Sets the remaining air of an entity to a specific amount of seconds. Players have a starting value of 15 seconds of air.

Armor.description: Sets the specified armor slot of the target to the item defined by the settings

Armor Stand.description: Summons an armor stand that can be used as a marker or for item display (check Armor Mechanic for latter). Applies child components on the armor stand

Armor Stand Pose.description: Sets the pose of an armor stand target. Values should be in the format x,y,z where rotations are in degrees. Example: 0.0,0.0,0.0

Armor Stand Remove.description: Removes an armor stand with the given key

Attribute.description: Gives a player bonus attributes temporarily

Block.description: Changes blocks to the given type of block for a limited duration

Buff.description: Buffs combat stats of the target

Cancel.description: Cancels the event that caused the trigger this is under to go off. For example, damage based triggers will stop the damage that was dealt while the Launch trigger would stop the projectile from firing

Channel.description: Applies child effects after a duration which can be interrupted. During the channel, the player cannot move, attack, or use other spells

Cleanse.description: Cleanses negative potion or status effects from the targets

Command.description: Executes a command for each of the targets

Cooldown.description: Lowers the cooldowns of the target\

Damage.description: Inflicts skill damage to each target. Multiplier type would be a percentage of the target health

cause.default: ['Contact', 'Custom', 'Entity Attack', 'Entity Sweep Attack', 'Projectile', 'Suffocation', 'Fall', 'Fire', 'Fire Tick', 'Melting', 'Lava', 'Drowning', 'Block Explosion', 'Entity Explosion', 'Void', 'Lightning', 'Suicide', 'Starvation', 'Poison', 'Magic', 'Wither', 'Falling Block', 'Thorns', 'Dragon Breath', 'Fly Into Wall', 'Hot Floor', 'Cramming', 'Dryout', 'Freeze', 'Sonic Boom']
cause.label: Damage Cause

Damage Buff.description: Modifies the physical damage dealt by each target by a multiplier or a flat amount for a limited duration. Negative flat amounts or multipliers less than one will reduce damage dealt while the opposite will increase damage dealt. (e.g. a 5% damage buff would be a multiplier or 1.05)

Damage Lore.description: Damages each target based on a value found in the lore of the item held by the caster

cause.default: ['Contact', 'Entity Attack', 'Entity Sweep Attack', 'Projectile', 'Suffocation', 'Fall', 'Fire', 'Fire Tick', 'Melting', 'Lava', 'Drowning', 'Block Explosion', 'Entity Explosion', 'Void', 'Lightning', 'Suicide', 'Starvation', 'Poison', 'Magic', 'Wither', 'Falling Block', 'Thorns', 'Dragon Breath', 'Custom', 'Fly Into Wall', 'Hot Floor', 'Cramming', 'Dryout', 'Freeze', 'Sonic Boom']
cause.label: Damage Cause

Defense Buff.description: Modifies the physical damage taken by each target by a multiplier or a flat amount for a limited duration. Negative flag amounts or multipliers less than one will reduce damage taken while the opposite will increase damage taken. (e.g. a 5% defense buff would be a multiplier or 0.95, since you would be taking 95% damage)

Delay.description: Applies child components after a delay

Disguise.description: Disguises each target according to the settings. This mechanic requires the LibsDisguise plugin to be installed on your server

Durability.description: Lowers the durability of a held item

Explosion.description: Causes an explosion at the current target\

Fire.description: Sets the target on fire for a duration

Flag.description: Marks the target with a flag for a duration. Flags can be checked by other triggers, spells or the related for interesting synergies and effects

Flag Clear.description: Clears a flag from the target

Flag Toggle.description: Toggles a flag on or off for the target. This can be used to make toggle effects

Fly.description: Grants creative flight to a target for a set duration. Can also be used to revoke flight.

Food.description: Adds or removes to a player\

Forget Targets.description: Clears targets stored by the "Remember Targets" mechanic

Held Item.description: Sets the held item slot of the target player. This will do nothing if trying to set it to a skill slot

Immunity.description: Provides damage immunity from one source for a duration

Interrupt.description: Interrupts any channeling being done by each target if applicable

Invisibility.description: Applies invisibility effect on target, optionally hiding equipment (Requires ProtocolLib).

Item.description: Gives each player target the item defined by the settings

Item Drop.description: Spawns a dropped item defined by the settings at the specified location

Item Projectile.description: Launches a projectile using an item as its visual that applies child components upon landing. The target passed on will be the collided target or the location where it landed if it missed

Item Remove.description: Removes an item from a player inventory. This does nothing to mobs

Launch.description: Launches the target relative to their forward direction. Use negative values to go in the opposite direction (e.g. negative forward makes the target go backwards)

Lightning.description: Strikes lightning on or near the target, applying child components to the struck targets. Negative offsets will offset it in the opposite direction (e.g. negative forward offset puts it behind the target)

Mana.description: Restores or deducts mana from the target

Message.description: Sends a message to each player target. To include numbers from Value mechanics, use the filters {} where  is the key the value is stored under

Mine.description: Destroys a selection of blocks at the location of the target

MythicMob Skill.description: Casts a MythicMob skill on current the targets.

Particle.description: Plays a particle effect about the target

Particle Animation.description: Plays an animated particle effect at the location of each target over time by applying various transformations

Particle Effect.description: Plays a particle effect that follows the current target, using formulas to determine shape, size, and motion

Particle Image.description: Displays an image using particles that (optionally) follows the current target

Particle Projectile.description: Launches a projectile using particles as its visual that applies child components upon landing. The target passed on will be the collided target or the location where it landed if it missed

Passive.description: Applies child components continuously every period. The seconds value below is the period or how often it applies

Permission.description: Grants each player target a permission for a limited duration. This mechanic requires Vault with an accompanying permissions plugin in order to work

Potion.description: Applies a potion effect to the target for a duration

Potion Projectile.description: Drops a splash potion from each target that does not apply potion effects by default. This will apply child elements when the potion lands. The targets supplied will be everything hit by the potion. If nothing is hit by the potion, the target will be the location it landed

Projectile.description: Launches a projectile that applies child components on hit. The target supplied will be the struck target

Purge.description: Purges the target of positive potion effects or statuses

Push.description: Pushes the target relative to the caster. This will do nothing if used with the caster as the target. Positive numbers apply knockback while negative numbers pull them in

Remember Targets.description: Stores the current targets for later use under a specified key

Repeat.description: Applies child components multiple times. When it applies them is determined by the delay (seconds before the first application) and period (seconds between successive applications)

Shield.description: Applies a shield to the target that absorbs a certain amount of damage

Signal Emit.description: Send a custom signal to all target that can be reused and processed separately.

Skill cast.description: Make target cast other skill. Recommended for use on players.

Sound.description: Plays a sound at the target\

Stat.description: Gives a player bonus stat temporarily. All available attribute stats

Status.description: Applies a status effect to the target for a duration

Summon.description: Summons a mob on each target. Child components will start off targeting the mob so you can add effects to it. Hostile mobs may attack the caster

Taunt.description: Draws aggro of targeted creatures. Regular mobs are set to attack the caster. The Spigot/Bukkit API for this was not functional on older versions, so it may not work on older servers. For MythicMobs, this uses their aggro system using the amount chosen below

Throw.description: Throws entities off of the target\

Trigger.description: Listens for a trigger on the current targets for a duration

Value Add.description: Adds to a stored value under a unique key for the caster. If the value wasn\

Value Copy.description: Copies a stored value from the caster to the target or vice versa

Value Distance.description: Stores the distance between the target and the caster into a value

Value Divide.description: Divides a stored value under a unique key for the caster. If the value wasn\

Value Load.description: If there is a value already stored on the account, that value will be retrieved and then be used as a normal value.

Value Lore.description: Loads a value from a held item\

Value Lore Slot.description: Loads a value from an item\

Value Math.description: Performs mathematical calculations using a custom formula to determine the value to set.The formula can use values as {value} type placeholders and complex math operationsincluding addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, modulo (%),square root (sqrt()), exponents (^), and more. Use random()to generate a psuedo-random number between 0 and 1. See thewiki for more information

Value Multiply.description: Multiplies a stored value under a unique key for the caster. If the value wasn\

Value Placeholder.description: Uses a placeholder string and stores it as a value for the caster

Value Random.description: Stores a specified value under a given key for the caster

Value Rotation.description: Stores a value as the rotation between the target\

Value Round.description: Rounds a stored value under a unique key for the caster. If the value wasn\

Value Set.description: Stores a specified value under a given key for the caster

Warp.description: Warps the target relative to their forward direction. Use negative numbers to go in the opposite direction (e.g. negative forward will cause the target to warp backwards)

Warp Location.description: Warps the target to a specified location

Warp Random.description: Warps the target in a random direction the given distance

Warp Swap.description: Switches the location of the caster and the target. If multiple targets are provided, this takes the first one

Warp Target.description: Warps either the target or the caster to the other. This does nothing when the target is the caster

Warp Value.description: Warps all targets to a location remembered using the Value Location mechanic

Wolf.description: Summons a wolf on each target for a duration. Child components will start off targeting the wolf so you can add effects to it. You can also give it its own skillset, though Cast triggers will not occur

Action Bar.description: Applies child componenets whether or not the action bar is showing based on the boolean set.

Air.description: Applies child components whenever the entity has an air value in the given range. Calculated in seconds left. By default, a player starts with 15 seconds of air.

Altitude.description: Applies child components whenever the player is on a certain height-level

Armor.description: Applies child components when the target is wearing an armor item matching the given details

Attack Indicator.description: Requires the target's attack to be charged to a certain amount.

Attribute.description: Requires the target to have a given number of attributes

Biome.description: Applies child components when in a specified biome

Block.description: Applies child components if the target is currently standing on a block of the given type

standing.default: ['On Block', 'Not On Block', 'In Block', 'Not In Block']
standing.label: Type

Blocking.description: Applies child components if the target player(s) are blocking with a shield

Burning.description: Applies child components if the caster burns or not

Ceiling.description: Checks the height of the ceiling above each target

Chance.description: Rolls a chance to apply child components

Class.description: Applies child components when the target is the given class or optionally a profession of that class. For example, if you check for "Fighter" which professes into "Warrior", a "Warrior" will pass the check if you do not enable "exact"

Class Level.description: Applies child components when the level of the class with this skill is within the range. This only checks the level of the caster, not the targets

Color.description: Applies child components when the target entity is of the specified color. Currently, this only works for sheep and shulkers

Combat.description: Applies child components to targets that are in/out of combat, depending on the settings

Crouch.description: Applies child components if the target player(s) are crouching

Direction.description: Applies child components when the target or caster is facing the correct direction relative to the other

Distance.description: Applies child components when the distance between the caster and the target matches the settings

Elevation.description: Applies child components when the elevation of the target matches the settings

Else.description: Applies child elements if the previous component failed to execute. This not only applies for conditions not passing, but mechanics failing due to no target or other cases

Entity Type.description: Applies child elements if the target matches one of the selected entity types

Fire.description: Applies child components when the target is on fire

Flag.description: Applies child components when the target is marked by the appropriate flag

Food.description: Applies child components when the target\

Ground.description: Applies child components when the target is on the ground

Glide.description: Applies child components if the target player(s) are gliding with an elytra

Health.description: Applies child components when the target\

Item.description: Applies child components when the target is wielding an item matching the given material

Inventory.description: Applies child components when the target player contains the given item in their inventory. This does not work on mobs

Light.description: Applies child components when the light level at the target\

Mana.description: Applies child components when the target\

Money.description: Applies child components when the target\

Moon.description: Applies child components if the target is in a world with a moon phase that matches.

phases.default: ['Full Moon', 'Waning Gibbous', 'Last Quarter', 'Waning Crescent', 'New Moon', 'Waxing Crescent', 'First Quarter', 'Waxing Gibbous']
phases.label: Phases

Mounted.description: Applies child elements if the target is being mounted by one of the selected entity types

Mounting.description: Applies child elements if the target is mounting one of the selected entity types

MythicMob Type.description: Applies child elements if the target corresponds to one of the entered MythicMob types, or is not a MythicMob if left empty

Name.description: Applies child components when the target has a name matching the settings

Offhand.description: Applies child components when the target is wielding an item matching the given material as an offhand item. This is for v1.9servers only

Permission.description: Applies child components if the caster has the required permission

Potion.description: Applies child components when the target has the potion effect

Skill Level.description: Applies child components when the skill level is with the range. This checks the skill level of the caster, not the targets

Slot.description: Applies child components when the target player has a matching item in the given slot

Sprint.description: Applies child components if the target player(s) are sprinting

Status.description: Applies child components when the target has the status condition

Time.description: Applies child components when the server time matches the settings

Tool.description: Applies child components when the target is wielding a matching tool

Value.description: Applies child components if a stored value is within the given range

Value Text.description: Applies child components if text value match to the settings

Water.description: Applies child components when the target is in or out of water, depending on the settings

Weather.description: Applies child components when the target\

World.description: Applies child components when the target is in a specific world

Yaw.description: Applies child components when the target is facing the correct direction. This is on a scale of 0-360 degrees. 0 is south, 90 is west, 180 is north, and 270 is east
